previewTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Liu Shaochuang - Episode 2

title.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Liu Shaochuang - Episode 2

text.value: Through the use of tracking collars and remote sensing technology, 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate Liu Shaochuang has been monitoring the movements of wild camels across the Gobi Desert. He has found their habitat is shrinking as a result of climate change and human activity, placing them in greater danger of both predation and disease. Liu believes that by identifying the threats the camels face, his findings can help mitigate them and protect the critically endangered species.

pageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 3

pageCaption.value: Winning a 2023 Rolex Award helps Liu Shaochuang to scale up his research by tracking and monitoring more wild camels.

WaPageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 3

pageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 1

pageCaption.value: Liu Shaochuang, a 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate, is using a modern solution to help an ancient creature. For thousands of years, wild camels have roamed the vast plains of the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and China but they are now critically endangered.

WaPageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Liu Shaochuang - Episode 1

metadescription.value: Remote sensing specialist Liu Shaochuang is applying his expertise to the protection of endangered camels in the Gobi Desert. Watch the video on rolex.org.

pageTitle.value: Promote local initiatives for biodiversity conservation in Nepal’s Trans-Himalaya - Video

pageCaption.value: Local people from one of the world’s wildest and most isolated places, the mountainous Himalaya region of Humla in Nepal, are being enlisted as frontline conservators to rescue dwindling wild animal populations – from snow leopards to wild yaks. Driving the scheme is an energetic young ecologist, Rinzin Phunjok Lama, who is convinced that only local commitment and know-how can make the real difference.

WaPageTitle.value: Promote local initiatives for biodiversity conservation in Nepal’s Trans-Himalaya - Video

metadescription.value: Rinzin Phunjok Lama passionately recounts his project  that is helping to save the rich biodiversity in the trans-Himalayas. See more on rolex.org.
